svg.title: 10 in half-ring cover — top view
svg.text: 10 in Half Ring Over Magnets — top view of one 180° printed half
Light gray = printed half ring, dark gray = steel half ring reference, blue = magnets, pale gray = alignment wedges, red = 2 mm tabs extending 1 mm beyond the 8 in steel OD.
20×5×2 mm each on the 6 in / 8 in steel half ring
derived wedge ≈ 2.09 mm at 8 in steel OD
90 magnets around the full ring = 4.00° per magnet
Same pitch narrows to 0.32 mm at the 6 in steel ID
2.0 mm tangential width, 1.0 mm radial overhang
Math check: outer pitch = 2π × 101.6 / 90 = 7.09 mm, so each 5.00 mm magnet leaves a wedge of 2.09 mm at the 8 in steel OD.
Magnets centered on the 6 in / 8 in steel ring leave 2.70 mm of radial margin to the 8 in OD, and the same angular pitch gives an inner wedge throat of 0.32 mm.
